name: Home Hero
description: The main entrance block for the homepage. Combines a punchy, multi-line heading with rich social proof, primary/secondary action buttons, and a collage of overlapping, 'floating' photos.

field_schema.label: Badge Text
field_schema.help: Small introductory text shown above the main heading (e.g., 'Xin chào!').

field_schema.label: Heading Line 1 (HTML allowed)
field_schema.help: The first line of the large hero title. Supports HTML entities.

field_schema.label: Heading Accent Word (red)
field_schema.help: A single word highlighted in the theme's red color. Include a trailing space if followed by more text.

field_schema.label: Heading Line 2 After Accent
field_schema.help: Text that appears immediately after the red accent word on the second line.

field_schema.label: Heading Line 3 Before Underlined Word
field_schema.help: Text that appears on the third line, before the final underlined word.

field_schema.label: Underlined Word
field_schema.help: The final word in the heading that will have a yellow brush-stroke underline effect.

field_schema.label: Subheading
field_schema.help: Supporting descriptive text shown below the main title. Aim for 2-3 lines.

field_schema.label: Primary CTA
field_schema.help: The large primary action button for the main conversion goal.

field_schema.label: Secondary CTA
field_schema.help: The secondary outline button for alternative paths (e.g., 'Meet the Crew').

field_schema.label: Social Proof (bold)
field_schema.help: The bold part of the social proof indicator (e.g., '2,400+ travelers').

field_schema.label: Social Proof (rest)
field_schema.help: Supporting text for the social proof line (e.g., '· Rated 4.9 on TripAdvisor').

field_schema.label: Floating Sticker Text
field_schema.help: Text for the floating circular yellow badge (e.g., '100% local-guided').

test_data.subheading: Small-group food crawls, mountain loops, and cooking classes — all run by locals who actually live here. No buses. No bullhorns. Just your new favorite country.
